mapper.sql: select id, user_id, day_str, game_type_code1, game_type_code2, game_type_code3, game_type_code4, game_type_code5, game_type_code6, game_type_code7, game_type_code8, game_type_code9, game_type_bet1, game_type_bet2, game_type_bet3, game_type_bet4, game_type_bet5, game_type_bet6, game_type_bet7, game_type_bet8, game_type_bet9, game_type_settle1, game_type_settle2, game_type_settle3, game_type_settle4, game_type_settle5, game_type_settle6, game_type_settle7, game_type_settle8, game_type_settle9, game_type_win_loss1, game_type_win_loss2, game_type_win_loss3, game_type_win_loss4, game_type_win_loss5, game_type_win_loss6, game_type_win_loss7, game_type_win_loss8, game_type_win_loss9, create_time, update_time from t_user_count_game_code
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user_count_game_code
user_id, day_str, game_type_code1, game_type_code2, game_type_code3, game_type_code4, game_type_code5, game_type_code6, game_type_code7, game_type_code8, game_type_code9, game_type_bet1, game_type_bet2, game_type_bet3, game_type_bet4, game_type_bet5, game_type_bet6, game_type_bet7, game_type_bet8, game_type_bet9, game_type_settle1, game_type_settle2, game_type_settle3, game_type_settle4, game_type_settle5, game_type_settle6, game_type_settle7, game_type_settle8, game_type_settle9, game_type_win_loss1, game_type_win_loss2, game_type_win_loss3, game_type_win_loss4, game_type_win_loss5, game_type_win_loss6, game_type_win_loss7, game_type_win_loss8, game_type_win_loss9, create_time, update_time,
#{userId}, #{dayStr}, #{gameTypeCode1}, #{gameTypeCode2}, #{gameTypeCode3}, #{gameTypeCode4}, #{gameTypeCode5}, #{gameTypeCode6}, #{gameTypeCode7}, #{gameTypeCode8}, #{gameTypeCode9}, #{gameTypeBet1}, #{gameTypeBet2}, #{gameTypeBet3}, #{gameTypeBet4}, #{gameTypeBet5}, #{gameTypeBet6}, #{gameTypeBet7}, #{gameTypeBet8}, #{gameTypeBet9}, #{gameTypeSettle1}, #{gameTypeSettle2}, #{gameTypeSettle3}, #{gameTypeSettle4}, #{gameTypeSettle5}, #{gameTypeSettle6}, #{gameTypeSettle7}, #{gameTypeSettle8}, #{gameTypeSettle9}, #{gameTypeWinLoss1}, #{gameTypeWinLoss2}, #{gameTypeWinLoss3}, #{gameTypeWinLoss4}, #{gameTypeWinLoss5}, #{gameTypeWinLoss6}, #{gameTypeWinLoss7}, #{gameTypeWinLoss8}, #{gameTypeWinLoss9}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_user_count_game_code where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_count_game_code (user_id, day_str, game_type_code1, game_type_code2, game_type_code3, game_type_code4, game_type_code5, game_type_code6, game_type_code7, game_type_code8, game_type_code9, game_type_bet1, game_type_bet2, game_type_bet3, game_type_bet4, game_type_bet5, game_type_bet6, game_type_bet7, game_type_bet8, game_type_bet9, game_type_settle1, game_type_settle2, game_type_settle3, game_type_settle4, game_type_settle5, game_type_settle6, game_type_settle7, game_type_settle8, game_type_settle9, game_type_win_loss1, game_type_win_loss2, game_type_win_loss3, game_type_win_loss4, game_type_win_loss5, game_type_win_loss6, game_type_win_loss7, game_type_win_loss8, game_type_win_loss9, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{dayStr}, #{gameTypeCode1}, #{gameTypeCode2}, #{gameTypeCode3}, #{gameTypeCode4}, #{gameTypeCode5}, #{gameTypeCode6}, #{gameTypeCode7}, #{gameTypeCode8}, #{gameTypeCode9}, #{gameTypeBet1}, #{gameTypeBet2}, #{gameTypeBet3}, #{gameTypeBet4}, #{gameTypeBet5}, #{gameTypeBet6}, #{gameTypeBet7}, #{gameTypeBet8}, #{gameTypeBet9}, #{gameTypeSettle1}, #{gameTypeSettle2}, #{gameTypeSettle3}, #{gameTypeSettle4}, #{gameTypeSettle5}, #{gameTypeSettle6}, #{gameTypeSettle7}, #{gameTypeSettle8}, #{gameTypeSettle9}, #{gameTypeWinLoss1}, #{gameTypeWinLoss2}, #{gameTypeWinLoss3}, #{gameTypeWinLoss4}, #{gameTypeWinLoss5}, #{gameTypeWinLoss6}, #{gameTypeWinLoss7}, #{gameTypeWinLoss8}, #{gameTypeWinLoss9}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE game_type_code1 = game_type_code1 + VALUES(game_type_code1), game_type_code2 = game_type_code2 + VALUES(game_type_code2), game_type_code3 = game_type_code3 + VALUES(game_type_code3) , game_type_code4 = game_type_code4 + VALUES(game_type_code4), game_type_code5 = game_type_code5 + VALUES(game_type_code5), game_type_code6 = game_type_code6 + VALUES(game_type_code6) , game_type_code7 = game_type_code7 + VALUES(game_type_code7), game_type_code8 = game_type_code8 + VALUES(game_type_code8), game_type_code9 = game_type_code9 + VALUES(game_type_code9) , game_type_bet1 = game_type_bet1 + VALUES(game_type_bet1), game_type_bet2 = game_type_bet2 + VALUES(game_type_bet2), game_type_bet3 = game_type_bet3 + VALUES(game_type_bet3) , game_type_bet4 = game_type_bet4 + VALUES(game_type_bet4), game_type_bet5 = game_type_bet5 + VALUES(game_type_bet5), game_type_bet6 = game_type_bet6 + VALUES(game_type_bet6) , game_type_bet7 = game_type_bet7 + VALUES(game_type_bet7), game_type_bet8 = game_type_bet8 + VALUES(game_type_bet8), game_type_bet9 = game_type_bet9 + VALUES(game_type_bet9) , game_type_settle1 = game_type_settle1 + VALUES(game_type_settle1), game_type_settle2 = game_type_settle2 + VALUES(game_type_settle2), game_type_settle3 = game_type_settle3 + VALUES(game_type_settle3) , game_type_settle4 = game_type_settle4 + VALUES(game_type_settle4), game_type_settle5 = game_type_settle5 + VALUES(game_type_settle5), game_type_settle6 = game_type_settle6 + VALUES(game_type_settle6) , game_type_settle7 = game_type_settle7 + VALUES(game_type_settle7), game_type_settle8 = game_type_settle8 + VALUES(game_type_settle8), game_type_settle9 = game_type_settle9 + VALUES(game_type_settle9) , game_type_win_loss1 = game_type_win_loss1 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss1), game_type_win_loss2 = game_type_win_loss2 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss2), game_type_win_loss3 = game_type_win_loss3 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss3) , game_type_win_loss4 = game_type_win_loss4 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss4), game_type_win_loss5 = game_type_win_loss5 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss5), game_type_win_loss6 = game_type_win_loss6 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss6) , game_type_win_loss7 = game_type_win_loss7 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss7), game_type_win_loss8 = game_type_win_loss8 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss8), game_type_win_loss9 = game_type_win_loss9 + VALUES(game_type_win_loss9) , update_time = VALUES(update_time)
